query:
UPDATE bookings 
SET paymentStatus = 'paid', 
    totalAmount = '10', 
    paymentDate = '2026-02-10 20:10:51',
    stripeSessionId = 'cs_live_b1y795dRFUdgiVoQwDPKEoPmVz1j7x5EA9qYdRJvjf9WLCT0qTKpfQlqiT'
WHERE id = (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT id FROM bookings 
    WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-10 19:00:00' 
    ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS temp
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute UPDATE bookings 
SET paymentStatus = 'paid', 
    totalAmount = '10', 
    paymentDate = '2026-02-10 20:10:51',
    stripeSessionId = 'cs_live_b1y795dRFUdgiVoQwDPKEoPmVz1j7x5EA9qYdRJvjf9WLCT0qTKpfQlqiT'
WHERE id = (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT id FROM bookings 
    WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-10 19:00:00' 
    ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS temp
);
